creator: jarrod@netleader.com.au
text:
Antoine,

Could you please give me some details on the reports you are running  
that generate the incorrectly sized image, including the actual size  
of the generated image?  I have tried a number of reports using  
differing settings and the image generated is always 900px wide.  If  
I can replicate the problem, i'll remove the size variable from the  
generated HTML files as requested.

Kind Regards,

Jarrod.
